creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
If you have installed devel/subversion you can't build net-mgmt/zenoss.

[root@timbsd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss]# pkg_info -Ex subver
subversion-1.7.3
[root@timbsd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss]# make install
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
=> zenoss-3.1.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/zenoss/zenoss-3.1/zenoss-3.1.0/zenoss-3.1.0.tar.gz
zenoss-3.1.0.tar.gz                           100% of  100 MB 1207 kBps 00m00s
=> JSBuilder2.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://dev.sencha.com/deploy/JSBuilder2.zip
JSBuilder2.zip                                100% of  849 kB  442 kBps
===>  Extracting for zenoss-3.1.0
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for zenoss-3.1.0.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for JSBuilder2.zip.
===>  Patching for zenoss-3.1.0
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for zenoss-3.1.0
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on package: swig>=1.3 - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/unzip - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on file: /usr/local/openjdk6/bin/java - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on executable: gmake - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/autoconf-2.68 - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on shared library: mysqlclient.18 - found
===>  Configuring for zenoss-3.1.0
===>  Building for zenoss-3.1.0
===>  Installing for zenoss-3.1.0
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on package: bash>=4.1 - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on package: net-snmp>=5.5 - found
===>   zenoss-3.1.0 depends on package: liberation-fonts-ttf>=1.05 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if net-mgmt/zenoss already installed
===> Creating users and/or groups.
Using existing group `zenoss'.
Using existing user `zenoss'.
./genpatchdeps.sh >.patchdeps
installing into: //usr/local/zenoss
build log is in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/zenbuild.log
 unpacking: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/libzenoss/Products.tar.gz --into--> //usr/local/zenoss/libzenoss
 unpacking: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/libzenoss/bin.tar.gz --into--> //usr/local/zenoss/libzenoss
 unpacking: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/libzenoss/extras.tar.gz --into--> //usr/local/zenoss/libzenoss
for i in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/externallibs/Licenses.html ; do \
        cp $i //usr/local/zenoss/ ; \
done
  unpacking: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/build/Python-2.6.2
patching file Lib/cgi.py
patching file Lib/xmlrpclib.py
Hunk #1 succeeded at 241 (offset 5 lines).
Hunk #2 succeeded at 676 (offset 74 lines).
Hunk #3 succeeded at 703 (offset 74 lines).
Hunk #4 succeeded at 804 (offset 84 lines).
Hunk #5 succeeded at 830 (offset 84 lines).
configuring: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/build/Python-2.6.2/Makefile
   building: /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss/work/zenoss-3.1.0/build/Python-2.6.2
unable to build zenoss and prerequisites, see zenbuild.log
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net-mgmt/zenoss.


zenbuild.log is here http://pastebin.com/XZ2t339s

Fix: 

Delete devel/subversion from your system. Install net-mgmt/zenoss and then install devel/subversion again.
How-To-Repeat: Install devel/subversion and then try to build net-mgmt/zenoss.
